{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3290a73e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Diff-In-Diff\n",
    "\n",
    "Difference in Difference is a quasi-experimental design that makes use of longitudinal data from treatment and control groups to obtain an appropriate counterfactual to estimate a causal effect.\n",
    "\n",
    "## Assumptions\n",
    "\n",
    "* Treatment/intervention and control groups have **Parallel Trends** in outcome during pre-treatment period. This is often confirmed via visual inspection. \n",
    "* Intervention unrelated to outcome at baseline (allocation of intervention was not determined by outcome)\n",
    "* Composition of intervention and comparison groups is stable for repeated cross-sectional design (part of SUTVA)\n",
    "* No spillover effects (part of SUTVA)\n",
    "    * SUTVA = Staple Unit Treatment Values. Simply put this means that units receiving treatment are only responding to its treatment, not the random assignment of others. \n",
    "    * In GeoX, this is assumed, but say if we target Geo's at the zip code level, you could argue that folks are traveling between zip codes and would violate this assumption. \n",
    "\n",
    "## Notes on implementation\n",
    "\n",
    "* Our implementation requires a simultaneous adoptions i.e. treatment start at same time for all treated units. \n",
    "\n",
    "### Resources\n",
    "* https://www.publichealth.columbia.edu/research/population-health-methods/difference-difference-estimation\n",
    "* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Difference_in_differences"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "df363e09",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [

   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# drop unused\n",
    "data = data[data.trt_unit!=-1]\n",
    "\n",
    "# make wide. Pre-Aggregate. \n",
    "data.index = data['date_date']\n",
    "del data['date_date']\n",
    "\n",
    "wide = pd.pivot_table(data, columns='date_date', index='trt_unit', values='sales', aggfunc=sum, fill_value=0)\n",
    "wide=wide[wide.columns[:-1]]\n",
    "\n",
    "wide.head()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 37,
   "id": "f86a1915",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "treated_times = wide.columns[-45:-7]\n",
    "treated_times = panel_data.TimePeriod(start=treated_times[0], end=treated_times[-1])\n",
    "treated_units = [1]\n",
    "pand = panel_data.PanelDataset(wide, treated_times, treated_units)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 38,
   "id": "00ecbc1a",

      "        \n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "print(pand.summarize())\n"
   ]
  },
